summary: Comprehensive testing of Solana Token Launchpad - All backend APIs and frontend UI elements working correctly

issues: Yellow background (#FFFF00) is very bright - consider a softer tone for better readability

critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper error handling
All data-testid attributes are properly implemented for testing
IPFS integration via Pinata is working correctly
Token creation flow properly handles authority revocation flags
test_credentials: No auth required - public API endpoints
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Token_API and TEST_Revoked_Token during API testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features tested and working: health check, image upload to IPFS, token creation with Metaplex metadata, token list, token verify, metadata JSON endpoint. Frontend has all required form elements (name, symbol, decimals, supply, description), drag-and-drop image upload zone, image URL fallback, authority toggles (mint, freeze, update). Explorer shows token list with search. Airdrop page has mint address and recipients inputs. Wallet connection requires browser extension (Phantom/Solflare) so wallet-specific tests were skipped.

backend_tests_summary.TestImageUpload: POST /api/upload-image accepts PNG, rejects non-image and empty files
backend_tests_summary.TestTokenCreation: POST /api/tokens/create returns mint, ata, metadataPda, metadataUri (ipfs://), totalMinted, transaction
backend_tests_summary.TestTokenList: GET /api/tokens returns array of tokens with proper structure

frontend_tests_summary.Launchpad: All form fields present (name, symbol, decimals, supply, description), image dropzone, URL fallback, authority toggles, create button
frontend_tests_summary.Explorer: Token table with search functionality, 36 tokens displayed, proper headers
frontend_tests_summary.Airdrop: Mint address input, recipients textarea, summary section, execute button
